# Bundle Identifiers

**API Collection**

Identifiers for exporting slideshow items to an application.

## Constants

- **IK_iPhotoBundleIdentifier**: The iPhoto application—`com.apple.iPhoto`.
- **IK_ApertureBundleIdentifier**: The Aperature application—`com.apple.Aperture`.
- **IK_MailBundleIdentifier**: The Mail application—`com.apple.mail`.

## Constants

- **Slideshow Modes**: The kind of items in the slideshow.
- **Slideshow Option Keys**: Keys for slideshow options.

items.description: The kind of items in the slideshow.
items.name: Slideshow Modes
